comments.author: @crosseyedone7960
comments.text: Mass immigration of people from India is quickly and dramatically changing the Tasmanian community.  Some would say "not for the better".

comments.author: @Retro-love-
comments.text: This was clearly written by AI and is spoken by AI. Nearly everything said in this video is an absolutely not true and even had my husband and I cringing. I was born here and apart from a few years in Melbourne and Perth been here all my life. I am now 60.  Even what is said about the weather is not true at all!  Maybe when I was growing up there were distinct seasons but definitely not anymore. For example this year any cold weather did not even start until mid June. Unheard of even 20 years ago.  I could go on about the whole damn thing but this is like a propaganda film. Made purely for click bait. Absolutely made up.   Try living in Hobart nowadays and say there is no rush and everyone knows each other etc etc. Launceston too 😀 what a joke.  Tasmania is bankrupt with no jobs and no infrastructure to support the constant immigration from the mainland and OS. We all suffer for it and false info like this film makes it worse.  The worst healthcare in the nation and education, roads, homelessness due to said immigration and migration here from mainland States and airbnbs due to tourism, poverty and ludicrous house prices and rents for such a tiny population and lower incomes. Add in a govt that doesn’t give a toss about actual residents. Oh and yes, we are a STATE not a “nation “ 🫠

comments.author: @metacoop_r
comments.text: Flight and ferry delays for days - what a load of bullshit. For a start there is only one ‘commuter’ ferry in Hobart , I’ve caught 100’s of flights and only had one cancellation (due to maintenance not the weather). While it’s far South it’s still Australia and does not have the cold & extreme weather of Northern Europe.
